full_text:
Zhou Guang 周光
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Guang (周光)was born in Wei commandery. Said to be dispatched to Wu by Wu Zhi to tell Sun Quan of Zhi’s surrender. Zhou Guang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
